zh.lifeSummary: 當Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I於大約1132年出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois40歲，母親Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim25歲。他於1158年之前與Marie Mathilde de DONZY在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1191年9月7日在以色列מחוז הצפון加利利享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I于大约1132年出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois40岁，母亲Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim25岁。他于1158年之前与Marie Mathilde de DONZY在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1191年9月7日在以色列מחוז הצפון加利利享年60岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sancerre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Ovila, Pierre.

French: habitational name from a region in Picardy, located to the southeast of the Somme river, named with Latin sana terra ‘healthy, wholesome land’, and perhaps also from Le Santerre, the name of several places in the northern part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Etienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I was born about 1132, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, his father, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, was 40 and his mother, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, was 25. He married Marie Mathilde de DONZY before 1158, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 7 September 1191, in Galilee, Northern, Israel, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I est né environ 1132, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marie Mathilde de DONZY avant 1158, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1191, à Galilee, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I um 1132 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois 40 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim 25. Er hat vor 1158 in Frankreich Marie Mathilde de DONZY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 7. September 1191 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Galilee, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I è nato il circa 1132 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marie Mathilde de DONZY prima del 1158, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 7 settembre 1191, nel Galilee, Northern, Israele, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre Iが約1132年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut IV le Grand de Bloisは40歳，母Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimは25歳であった。1158年以前にフランスでMarie Mathilde de DONZYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1191年9月7日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןガリリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1158년 이전 프랑스에서 Marie Mathilde de DONZY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1191년 9월 7일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון 갈라일리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Mathilde de DONZY antes 1158, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1191, em Galilee, Northern, Israel, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I родился около 1132 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Mathilde de DONZY перед 1158 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 7 сентября 1191 г. в местности галили, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 60 лет.
